title: Show-off Vietnamese Ciabatta Sandwich
description: A flavorful, fermented, and aerated Vietnamese dish featuring ciabatta, flambe, and paleo-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: Pickled carrots and daikon
ingredients.notes: Make your own using vinegar, sugar, and spices

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Slice the ciabatta bread into 1-inch thick slices and toast until lightly browned.
In a small pan, heat the safflower oil over medium heat and add the sliced scallions. Cook until softened.
In a large skillet, cook the spiced pork sausage over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the pickled carrots and daikon to the skillet with the pork sausage and stir to combine.
Brush the toasted ciabatta slices with the remaining safflower oil and place on a baking sheet.
Top each slice of ciabatta with a spoonful of the pork sausage and vegetable mixture.
Place the baking sheet under the broiler and cook until the bread is lightly browned and the filling is heated through.
Remove the sandwich from the oven and sprinkle with chopped cilantro and sliced jalape0s.
